steps.title: Read the dot plot to identify set A's distribution
steps.content:
The dot plot shows:
  • 2 μF: 3 capacitors
  • 5 μF: 4 capacitors
  • 8 μF: 2 capacitors
  • 11 μF: 4 capacitors
  • 14 μF: 3 capacitors
Total: 16 capacitors in set A.

steps.title: Calculate mean and range of set A
Apply the transformation: add 17 μF to every capacity in set A
steps.content:
When a constant is added to every data value:
  • Mean increases by that constant. If all 16 capacitors increase by 17 μF, their mean also increases by 17 μF.
  • Range stays the same. Both the minimum and maximum shift up by 17 μF, so their difference remains unchanged.

Therefore:
$$\text{Mean}_B = 8 + 17 = 25 \text{ μF}$$
$$\text{Range}_B = 12 \text{ μF}$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
